overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player moves from a neon-lit covered walkway through a security gate into a sunlit plaza with palm trees and food market stalls, transitioning from artificial to golden hour natural lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian shopping arcade with digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered pedestrian arcade lined with large digital advertisements and palm tree planters

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertisement displaying All Night Every Night with male figure
overhead roof structure covering the pedestrian walkway
large concrete planter with palm trees and spiky plants
tall skyscraper with illuminated windows and neon accents visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian arcade lined with massive digital billboards advertising various products. The environment is illuminated by neon artificial lighting, with palm trees in planters on the right side and a futuristic glass tower visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint gate with high voltage warnings

events.description: transition from neon artificial lighting to natural golden hour sunlight as camera turns corner toward the gate
approaching metal security gate with illuminated yellow danger signs

agents.ego_description: turning left toward the sunlit security gate while continuing to walk forward

entered.detail: large metal gate structure with vertical bars blocking the path ahead
illuminated yellow signs reading DANGER HIGH VOLTAGE KEEP AWAY on gate pillars
elevated transit track or highway structure visible above the gate

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions dramatically as the camera turns left toward a security gate, shifting from neon-lit artificial lighting to bright golden hour sunlight streaming through the gate. The path narrows as it approaches the metal gate structure with prominent danger warning signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sunlit plaza with elevated transit line

events.description: passing through security gate into open sunlit plaza with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking through sunlit plaza with long shadows cast by palm trees and elevated highway overhead

entered.detail: wide open paved area bathed in golden hour sunlight
row of palm trees lining the right side of the plaza path
small vendor stalls and kiosks visible along the sides of the plaza

segments.scene_description: Passing through the gate into a wide open plaza bathed in warm golden hour sunlight. Long shadows stretch across the concrete ground from the palm trees lining the path, while an elevated transit track runs overhead. Food vendor kiosks begin to appear along the sides of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor food market with vendor stalls and tourists

events.description: crowd density increases significantly around food vendor area with tourists taking photos

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense crowd gathered around food vendor stalls, observing tourists taking photos of the market

notable_agents.action: tourist taking photo of food stalls with phone camera
food vendor working behind the counter serving customers

entered.detail: active food service counters with steam and cooking equipment
vertical pillars displaying rotating digital advertisements
yellow and black striped concrete barriers lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: Entering a bustling outdoor food market area with dense crowds gathered around vendor stalls. Tourists are taking photos while vendors work behind counters. The lighting mixes golden hour sunlight with artificial illumination from the stalls and digital advertisement pillars.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit pedestrian arcade into a sun-drenched outdoor plaza and bustling food market. It begins by gliding through a covered walkway lined with massive digital billboards and planters, where artificial neon light dominates the atmosphere. As the camera turns left, the environment shifts dramatically toward a security gate, where the cool artificial glow gives way to bright golden hour sunlight streaming through the metal structure. The scene then opens into a wide plaza bathed in warm light and long shadows beneath an elevated transit track, before moving further into a crowded market area. Finally, the camera weaves through dense groups of tourists and vendors, where the golden natural light blends with the vibrant artificial illumination of food stalls and advertisement pillars.
